name: aave-claw
description: Monitor Aave DeFi positions, health factors, and yield opportunities across 12+ networks. Built in Rust for maximum performance.
author: susanudgzf

tools.name: get_positions
tools.description: Get all Aave V3 supply/borrow positions and health factor for an Ethereum address.

returns.description: UserPosition object with health_factor, collateral, debt, supplied and borrowed assets

tools.name: get_yields
tools.description: Get current Aave yield (APY) opportunities sorted by liquidity.

returns.description: List of YieldOpportunity objects with supply/borrow APYs and liquidity data

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check if a position's health factor is below a danger threshold.

threshold.description: Minimum safe health factor (liquidation happens at 1.0)
